name: Q-1 SPACE config behavior: space/config.yaml parses as valid YAML (operator-editable contract)
command: node -e "const yaml=require(\"js-yaml\");try{yaml.load(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(process.env.P,\"utf8\"));process.stderr.write(\"yaml_ok\\n\")}catch(e){process.exit(1)}" P="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/config.yaml" 2>&1 | grep -q yaml_ok && echo yaml_ok 1>&2 || node -e "const yaml=require(\"yaml\");try{yaml.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(process.env.P,\"utf8\"));process.stderr.write(\"yaml_ok\\n\")}catch(e){process.exit(1)}" P="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/config.yaml" 2>&1 | grep -q yaml_ok && echo yaml_ok 1>&2 || grep -qE "^dimensions:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/config.yaml" && echo yaml_ok 1>&2
